title: rosa × woodsiana
intro: Rosa × woodsiana, also known as the Woods' rose, is a hybrid rose species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rosa × woodsiana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues due to its antibacterial and antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of Rosa × woodsiana typically involve infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
